TextENGNew: "All right!@k@vS23/02/VTH_rena1081. We got those trunks off of Keiichi-kun!!"
"Kei-chaaaan!!@k@vS23/03/VTH_mion1161. Thank goodness, thank goodness! I'm so glad!"
changeReason: New translation repeats 'thank goodness' matching the JPN よかったよかった (repeated), conveying Mion's emotional relief more faithfully than the old single instance.

TextENGNew: "Th-that's not good at all!!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11270. Just a few more minutes and I would've been irresistible!"

"You're completely wrong about that!!@k@vS23/04/VTH_satoko1079. We've been telling you this entire time!@k@vS23/04/VTH_satoko1080. Those trunks make the person whose name is on the tag fall in love with whoever wears them!@k@|@y@vS23/04/VTH_satoko1081. So if your own name was written there, you'd only be able to love yourself! You'd spend the rest of your life gazing at your reflection in the mirror, muttering creepy things to yourself!"
"...What a shame. That would have been quite amusing. Meep."
"D-...do you really mean that...?@k@|@y@vS23/01/VTH_k11272. Wait... seriously...?"
"Yeah, it's true...@k@vS23/02/VTH_rena1083. It would be terrible if you lost all interest in girls...@k@vS23/02/VTH_rena1084. You just wouldn't be Keiichi-kun anymore..."
"Y-yeah! A non-perverted Kei-chan would be nothing but an impostor!@k@|@y@vS23/03/VTH_mion1163. Seriously though, that was a really close call."
"...If Keiichi lost all interest in the opposite sex, there are people who would be truly sad. Nipah~☆."
"I-I don't really understand what happened, but I guess it was a close call...@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11274. ...Thanks, everyone.@k@|@y@vS23/01/VTH_k11275. And I'm sorry for not believing you."
"All's well that ends well, so we forgive you!@k@|@y@vS23/04/VTH_satoko1083. Besides, this was far more entertaining than just spending a day playing at the pool!"
"Y-yeah, you're right. Hahahahaha."
changeReason: New adds 'you're right' matching JPN そうだよな (that's right/you're right), which conveys Keiichi's agreement rather than just an affirmative grunt.

TextENGNew: "The day's not over yet, Keiichi-kun.@k@|@y@vS23/02/VTH_rena1086. Let's eat lunch, and then have even more fun this afternoon!@k@vS23/02/VTH_rena1087. We'll play and play and play at the pool all day...!"

"...Wait... the thing is, I, um...@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11278. My trunks just got stripped off me, so... I'm kind of... completely naked right now...@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11279. ...And you want me to keep playing at the pool like this...?"
changeReason: Old euphemistically says 'I'm not exactly dressed'; new says 'completely naked' matching JPN すっぽんぽん (completely nude), making the comedic situation explicit rather than vague.

TextENGNew: Hehehehe, ahyahyahya!!
"...Keiichi, we happen to have a swimsuit right here that would be perfect for you."

"N-noooo! There's no way I'm wearing those embarrassing swan trunks!!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11281. I'm a student! Why should I have to play at the pool dressed like some kind of gag comedian?!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11282. Soul Brothers!! Stop fighting over those trunks and come help me~!!"
"Aahahahahaha!!"
Over there, the Soul Brothers were still wrestling.@k@rOver here, the club members were having their own scuffle.
The women who'd been freed from the Maid in Heaven offensive had launched their own counterattack,@k@rand chaos was erupting in every direction.
"And so, the pool has been packed with excitement since this morning. It's been an eventful, chaotic, and truly wonderful day. ...Nipah~☆."
"...Hey, Rika.@k@|@y@vS23/04/VTH_satoko1085. Are you really going to end on that note?@k@vS23/04/VTH_satoko1086. I feel like there's still one more twist to this story..."
"...Meep? You mean what happens when one of the Soul Brothers puts on those trunks with Keiichi's name sewn inside?"
"Ah!! So that means... Keiichi-san will fall in love with whoever ends up wearing those trunks?!"
"...Three hours from now, we'll witness the birth of a steamy new couple -- Keiichi and his wonderful buddy. Nipah~☆."
"...By the way, Hanyuu?@k@vS23/05/VTH_rika1089. Can you look ahead and see which one of them wins?"
"Th-that sounds horrifying!@k@|@y@vS23/12/VTH_hanyu1041. I don't want to see such a grotesque outcome! Or even know about it! Au!"
